topic_text: When Pollution is high from Foobot, do Send my car a notification using BMW Labs. If pollution is high, send my car dash notification. Air high pollution notification from your cars dashboard

When Current pollen count rises above from Weather Underground, do Log an event using UP by Jawbone. Pollen count high (>9), post to Jawbone UP. Simple & clean info If local pollen count is high (>9) then display in Jawbone UP app Pollen levels between 9.7 - 12.0 tend to affect most individuals who suffer from the pollen types of the season Symptoms may become more severe during days with high pollen levels.
